steps.notes: No tailwind.config.ts created — Tailwind v4 uses CSS-based config via @theme in globals.css. Added .eslintrc.json (extends next/core-web-vitals) because next lint was unconfigured and prompted interactively. Fonts: Lora (--font-serif) and Inter (--font-sans) via next/font/google.

TDD for session.ts: 6 tests written first (all failed), then implementation. Fixed TS2540 (NODE_ENV readonly) in test by casting process.env. Middleware updated to handle both UI routes (cookie→redirect) and API routes (cookie OR bearer token). Old middleware only covered API bearer auth; new matcher pattern covers all routes except login, api/login, api/webhook, _next, and static assets.

Strict TDD: 12 tests written first (confirmed failing), then implementation until all pass. All date math uses UTC to avoid local-timezone drift. Monday-first via (getUTCDay()+6)%7. addMonths uses flat 0-based month index to handle Dec→Jan and Jan→Dec rollover correctly. habits-client.ts uses INTERNAL_BASE_URL env var (defaults to http://localhost:3000) for server-side fetching.

assumptions: ESLint was not configured before Step 1; added .eslintrc.json extending next/core-web-vitals as it was required for `npm run lint` to exit non-interactively.
Tailwind v4 CSS-based @theme config does not require a tailwind.config.ts file.
iron-session@8 getIronSession works with Next.js 15 App Router API routes by accepting (request, response) and calling session.save() before returning the response.
The middleware matcher regex excludes /login (no leading slash) which covers both GET /login (page) and is combined with explicit /api/login exclusion.
INTERNAL_BASE_URL defaults to http://localhost:3000 for local dev; production deployments should set this to the internal service URL.
